description: Simplify project from full-featured AI note-taking system to minimal auth-only boilerplate with MySQL

userStories.title: Remove all memo-related database schemas
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to remove memo, attachment, category, tag, and relation schemas so only users table remains.
acceptanceCriteria: Update apps/server/src/db/schema/index.ts to export only users schema
userStories.notes: Completed - schema files deleted and index updated. Expected typecheck errors in services will be resolved in later stories.

userStories.title: Remove all AI-related database schemas
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to remove AI conversation, message, and recommendation schemas.
userStories.notes: Completed - AI-related schema files deleted (ai-conversations, ai-messages, daily-recommendations, push-rules) and index.ts updated. Expected typecheck errors in services will be resolved in later stories.

userStories.title: Simplify users table schema to essential fields only
userStories.description: As a developer, I need users table with only id, email, password, username, avatar, timestamps.
acceptanceCriteria: Update apps/server/src/db/schema/users.ts to keep only: id, email, password, username, avatar, createdAt, updatedAt
Remove phone, settings, or other non-essential fields
userStories.notes: Completed - users table simplified to essential fields (id, email, password, username, avatar, createdAt, updatedAt). Email has unique constraint. Removed phone, salt, status fields. Changed uid→id, nickname→username. Expected typecheck errors in services/controllers will be resolved in later stories.

userStories.title: Delete all old migration files
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to remove all existing migration files for a clean slate.
acceptanceCriteria: Delete all files in apps/server/drizzle/ directory
userStories.notes: Completed - Created empty apps/server/drizzle/ directory with .gitkeep file. Directory was not previously existing, so no files needed deletion. Ready for fresh migration generation in US-005. Typecheck errors exist but are expected from US-003 schema changes and will be resolved in later stories.

userStories.title: Generate fresh migration for users table only
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a single clean migration that creates only the users table.
acceptanceCriteria: Run pnpm build in apps/server to compile schemas
Run pnpm migrate:generate to create new migration
Verify migration SQL creates only users table
Verify migration includes email unique constraint
userStories.notes: Completed - Generated migration drizzle/0000_new_jigsaw.sql which creates users table (with id, email, password, username, avatar, timestamps) and table_migrations table. Email has unique constraint and index. Used existing compiled schemas from dist/ since full build fails with expected errors from previous stories. Typecheck errors exist but are expected from US-003 schema changes and will be resolved in later stories.

userStories.title: Delete all old migration scripts in src/migrations/scripts
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to remove the custom migration system scripts.
acceptanceCriteria: Delete all files in apps/server/src/migrations/scripts/ except index.ts
userStories.notes: Completed - Deleted 18 migration script files (001-init through 018-backfill-memo-vectors). Updated index.ts to export empty ALL_MIGRATIONS array. Kept helper functions for backward compatibility. No typecheck errors in migrations/scripts/index.ts - all errors are expected from previous stories.

userStories.title: Remove LanceDB source file
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to delete LanceDB integration code.
acceptanceCriteria: Typecheck passes (expect errors in services - will fix later)
userStories.notes: Completed - Deleted apps/server/src/sources/lancedb.ts. Expected typecheck errors in services (embedding.service.ts, multimodal-embedding.service.ts, explore.service.ts, scheduler.service.ts, attachment.service.ts, tag.service.ts, daily-content.generator.ts), app.ts, debug.ba.controller.ts, and migrate-lancedb-to-mysql.ts script. These will be resolved in later stories (US-008 through US-012).

userStories.title: Remove embedding services
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to delete all embedding and vector-related services.
acceptanceCriteria: Typecheck passes (expect errors in other services - will fix later)
userStories.notes: Completed - Deleted embedding.service.ts and multimodal-embedding.service.ts. Expected typecheck errors in services that import these (explore.service.ts, scheduler.service.ts, attachment.service.ts, tag.service.ts, daily-content.generator.ts) and in app.ts, debug.ba.controller.ts. These will be resolved in US-009 through US-012.

userStories.title: Remove AI and recommendation services
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to delete AI conversation, recommendation, and explore services.
acceptanceCriteria: Typecheck passes (expect errors in controllers - will fix later)
userStories.notes: Completed - Deleted ai-conversation.service.ts (374 lines), ai.service.ts (171 lines), explore.service.ts (1123 lines), and recommendation.service.ts (299 lines). Expected typecheck errors in controllers (ai.controller.ts, explore.controller.ts, insights.controller.ts) that import these services. These will be resolved in US-012 when controllers are deleted.

userStories.title: Remove memo and related services
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to delete memo, attachment, category, tag, and relation services.
acceptanceCriteria: Typecheck passes (expect errors in controllers - will fix later)
userStories.notes: Completed - Deleted memo.service.ts (50K), memo-relation.service.ts (4.8K), attachment.service.ts (18K), category.service.ts (6.2K), and tag.service.ts (11K). Total: 3040 lines removed. Expected typecheck errors in controllers (memo.controller.ts, memo.ba.controller.ts, attachment.controller.ts, attachment.ba.controller.ts, category.controller.ts, tag.controller.ts, insights.controller.ts) that import these services. These will be resolved in US-012 when controllers are deleted.

userStories.title: Remove OCR, ASR, and other specialized services
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to delete OCR, ASR, push rule, scheduler, and notification services.
acceptanceCriteria: Typecheck passes (expect errors in controllers - will fix later)
userStories.notes: Completed - Deleted OCR directory (4 files), ASR service, push-rule service, scheduler service, channels directory (6 files), avatar service, and github-release service. Total: 1974 lines removed. Expected typecheck errors in app.ts (imports scheduler/lancedb), controllers (import deleted services), user.service.ts (uses old field names). These will be resolved in US-012 (controllers), US-013 (user.service), US-017 (auth middleware), US-023 (app.ts).

userStories.title: Remove all controllers except auth and user
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to delete all non-authentication controllers.
userStories.notes: Completed - Deleted 14 controller files (memo, attachment, category, tag, AI, explore, insights, OCR, ASR, push-rule, system, debug, static) and updated controllers/index.ts to only export auth and user controllers. Total: 2628 lines removed. Expected typecheck errors remain in auth.controller.ts, user.controller.ts (use old field names uid/nickname), user.service.ts, auth middleware, app.ts, and migration scripts. These will be resolved in US-013 (user.service), US-015/US-016 (registration/login endpoints), US-017 (auth middleware), US-023 (app.ts).

userStories.title: Update user.service.ts to minimal implementation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need UserService with only essential methods for auth.
acceptanceCriteria: Keep only: createUser(), getUserByEmail(), getUserById() methods in user.service.ts
Remove all other methods and unused imports
Ensure methods use Drizzle queries correctly
userStories.notes: Completed - Simplified user.service.ts to only 3 essential methods (createUser, getUserByEmail, getUserById). Removed CategoryService dependency, bcrypt helper methods, phone lookup, update, delete, and changePassword methods. Total: 148 lines removed. Uses new field names (id, username) instead of old ones (uid, nickname). Expected typecheck errors in auth.controller.ts, user.controller.ts, and auth middleware will be resolved in US-015, US-016, US-017.

userStories.title: Create RegisterDto and LoginDto in packages/dto
userStories.description: As a developer, I need auth DTOs defined for registration and login.
acceptanceCriteria: Create RegisterDto with email, password, username fields
Create LoginDto with email and password fields
userStories.notes: Completed - Created auth.ts with RegisterDto (email, password, username) and LoginDto (email, password). Created user.ts with simplified UserInfoDto (id, email, username, avatar). Updated index.ts to export both. Built successfully. Typecheck passes.

userStories.title: Implement user registration endpoint
userStories.description: As a user, I want to register a new account with email, username, and password.
acceptanceCriteria: Hash password with bcrypt before storing
Return JWT token and user info on success
Return appropriate error codes for validation failures
userStories.notes: Completed - Implemented registration endpoint with email validation, bcrypt password hashing (10 rounds), JWT token generation (90-day expiration), and LoginResponseDto response. Sets httpOnly cookie. Returns appropriate error codes for validation failures and duplicate emails. No typecheck errors in auth.controller.ts.

userStories.title: Implement user login endpoint
userStories.description: As a user, I want to log in with email and password.
acceptanceCriteria: Return JWT token and user info on success
userStories.notes: Completed - Implemented login endpoint with bcrypt password verification, JWT token generation (90-day expiration), and LoginResponseDto response. Returns 401 for invalid credentials (USER_NOT_FOUND, PASSWORD_ERROR). Sets httpOnly cookie. No typecheck errors in auth.controller.ts.

userStories.title: Update auth middleware for MySQL user lookup
userStories.description: As a developer, I need auth middleware to query MySQL instead of LanceDB.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify JWT token and attach user to request
userStories.notes: Completed - Updated auth-handler.ts to use UserService.getUserById() instead of findUserByUid(). Changed JWT payload field from uid to id. Updated request.user to use new field names (id, username, avatar). No typecheck errors in auth-handler.ts. Expected errors in app.ts, user.controller.ts, and migration scripts will be resolved in later stories.

userStories.title: Remove LanceDB dependencies from package.json
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to remove LanceDB, vectordb, and Apache Arrow packages.
acceptanceCriteria: Run pnpm install to update lockfile
userStories.notes: Completed - Removed @lancedb/lancedb and apache-arrow from apps/server/package.json. Ran pnpm install to update lockfile (removed 17 packages). Expected typecheck/build errors in migration files (executor.ts, index.ts, types.ts import @lancedb/lancedb), models/db/schema.ts (imports apache-arrow), app.ts, user.controller.ts, and migrate-lancedb-to-mysql.ts. These will be resolved in later stories (US-023 for app.ts, migration files can be cleaned up later).

userStories.title: Remove OpenAI and AI SDK dependencies
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to remove all AI-related packages.
acceptanceCriteria: Run pnpm install to update lockfile
userStories.notes: Completed - Removed @ai-sdk/openai, @langchain/openai, @langchain/core, @langchain/langgraph, ai, and langchain packages from apps/server/package.json. Updated pnpm-lock.yaml (removed 772 lines). Typecheck errors exist but are expected from previous stories (app.ts, user.controller.ts, migration files) - no new errors related to AI packages.

userStories.title: Remove OCR, ASR, and image processing dependencies
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to remove OCR, ASR, and image processing packages.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove tesseract.js, sharp, jimp, or similar image processing libs
Remove zhipu or other OCR SDKs
Run pnpm install to update lockfile
userStories.notes: Completed - No OCR, ASR, or image processing packages found in apps/server/package.json. These packages were never added to the project or were already removed in earlier cleanup. No changes needed.

userStories.title: Remove S3 and OSS storage adapter dependencies
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to remove cloud storage SDKs.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove @aws-sdk/*, ali-oss, or similar cloud storage packages
Run pnpm install to update lockfile
userStories.notes: Completed - Removed @aws-sdk/client-s3, @aws-sdk/s3-request-presigner, and ali-oss packages from package.json. Deleted entire unified-storage-adapter directory (6 files: base.adapter.ts, factory.ts, index.ts, local.adapter.ts, oss.adapter.ts, s3.adapter.ts). Updated pnpm-lock.yaml (removed 123 packages). Typecheck errors remain the same as previous stories - no new errors.

userStories.title: Update server environment configuration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need .env.example with only MySQL and JWT variables.
acceptanceCriteria: Update apps/server/.env.example to include only: DATABASE_URL, JWT_SECRET, PORT, CORS_ORIGIN, NODE_ENV
Remove all LanceDB, OpenAI, S3, OSS, AI-related variables
userStories.notes: Completed - Simplified .env.example to only include essential MySQL and JWT configuration. Removed all LanceDB, OpenAI, S3, OSS, AI, OCR, ASR, multimodal embedding, scheduler, and optimization configuration. Added clear comments for each variable. Typecheck passes (expected errors remain from previous stories).

userStories.title: Update server startup to remove LanceDB and scheduler
userStories.description: As a developer, I need server startup to initialize only MySQL.
acceptanceCriteria: Update apps/server/src/index.ts to remove LanceDB initialization
Keep only: IOC → MySQL → Migrations → Express server
Update graceful shutdown to close only MySQL connections
userStories.notes: Completed - Removed LanceDB and scheduler initialization from app.ts. Removed imports for SchedulerService and LanceDatabaseService. Removed LanceDB.init() and scheduler.init() calls. Updated graceful shutdown to only close MySQL connections. No typecheck errors in app.ts or index.ts. Expected errors remain in user.controller.ts, migration files, and migrate-lancedb-to-mysql.ts script (will be resolved in later stories).

userStories.title: Create comprehensive CLAUDE.md documentation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need detailed documentation for future development.
acceptanceCriteria: Create new CLAUDE.md with project overview (minimal auth boilerplate)
Document monorepo structure and package architecture
Document all development commands (dev, build, test, lint)
Explain frontend architecture (React 19, routing, state management, theming)
Explain backend architecture (Express, controllers, services, DI, MySQL/Drizzle)
Document MySQL setup and migration workflow
Include TypeScript config and code style guidelines
Provide examples for common tasks (adding endpoints, DTOs, migrations)
List all environment variables with descriptions
